overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through a dystopian Night City street at dusk. The scene features towering neon-lit structures, industrial scaffolding, and futuristic architecture with atmospheric fog and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with neon stadium structure

events.description: futuristic sedan passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the wet asphalt street toward the industrial towers in the distance

notable_agents.action: sleek dark sedan driving past the camera with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: large triangular glass structure with colorful neon edges and graffiti artwork on the panels
tall cylindrical industrial building with antennas and construction cranes on top
raised concrete roadway with green neon accents crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The sequence opens on a wet cyberpunk city street at dusk, with a massive geometric stadium structure glowing with colorful neon lights on the right. The camera moves forward along the asphalt toward industrial towers in the distance, passing under an elevated highway as a futuristic sedan drives by.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial scaffolding area with large statue

events.description: moving from open street into cluttered industrial area with metal scaffolding and debris

agents.ego_description: navigating through a cluttered construction area with metal scaffolding and industrial debris

entered.detail: massive humanoid figure holding a dish-like object, surrounded by metal scaffolding and covered in colorful graffiti
industrial metal staircase with railings leading to an upper platform
ripped and torn blue fabric covering scaffolding on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a more enclosed industrial zone dominated by a massive statue surrounded by scaffolding. The camera moves past metal staircases and under tattered blue tarps, with the industrial tower now visible to the right as the neon stadium fades from view behind.

events.description: turning right at intersection to follow the main avenue lined with palm trees

agents.ego_description: turning onto a main avenue lined with palm trees and massive corporate towers

notable_agents.action: large truck driving away from camera down the avenue

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive vertical orange stripes and curved glass facade
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk along the avenue
pink illuminated strips embedded along the road edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the industrial area, the scene opens into a wide avenue with a massive striped skyscraper dominating the left side. The camera turns right along the palm-lined street, passing pink neon ground lights as a truck drives ahead in the distance.

events.description: passing a slow-moving truck on the right side of the curved road

agents.ego_description: moving quickly along the curved road, passing vehicles and approaching the neon-lit stadium district

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck moving slowly in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: massive skeletal metal framework of a stadium or arena with exposed beams
bright colorful advertising screens and digital displays in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves swiftly along a curved avenue, passing a slow-moving truck on the right. The massive skeletal structure of a stadium becomes visible on the left while holographic billboards glow in the distance, and the industrial control tower remains visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza in front of For All Mankind stadium entrance

events.description: approaching the entrance plaza with crowds of people gathered near the building

agents.ego_description: approaching the brightly lit entrance of the For All Mankind building, observing pedestrians and the neon architecture

notable_agents.action: person walking toward the building entrance
group of people sitting on a bench near the entrance

entered.detail: building entrance with large green neon sign reading 'For All Mankind' and 'Chad' underneath, with glass canopy

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the brightly lit entrance plaza of the 'For All Mankind' building, its green neon signage glowing prominently. Pedestrians walk and gather near the entrance while the colorful geometric stadium roof reappears on the right, now closer and more detailed. The scene ends with a view of the entrance canopy and parked vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched dystopian city, transitioning from a wet industrial corridor into a wide, brightly lit corporate plaza. It begins on a damp asphalt street at dusk, gliding past a glowing geometric stadium and under an elevated highway as a futuristic sedan passes by. As the camera enters a more enclosed industrial zone, the neon stadium fades behind metal staircases and tattered blue tarps surrounding a massive statue under scaffolding. The scene then opens into a wide, palm-lined avenue dominated by a striped skyscraper on the left, before curving right past pink ground lights and a slow-moving truck toward distant holographic billboards. Finally, the camera approaches the entrance plaza of the For All Mankind building, where green neon signage and gathering pedestrians lead the eye back toward the detailed roof of the geometric stadium.
